data.title: Megabit will launch GPS/USDT perpetual contract, supporting up to 75x leverage
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Megabit officially announced that it will officially launch GPS/USDT 1-75x perpetual contract trading at 18:00 (SGT) on February 28.

data.title: GOAT Network announces the launch of airdrop activity and will open pre-deposit in cooperation with StakeStone next week
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Bitcoin Layer2 solution GOAT Network announced the launch of the One Piece Project airdrop event. Users can mint a soul-bound NFT and then accumulate real BTC rewards and points, which can be used for future token rewards.
In addition, GOAT Network also announced that it will cooperate with StakeStone to open pre-deposits on GOAT LiquidityPad next week in preparation for the upcoming alpha mainnet.

data.title: AscendEX will launch XDC Network (XDC)
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: AscendEX (formerly BitMax) will launch XDC Network (XDC) at 18:00 on February 28, open XDC/USDT trading pairs, and recharge is now open.

data.title: Arizona: progress towards the approval of digital asset reserve laws
data.description:
Legislative proposals for the creation of a digital asset reserve fund are advancing in Arizona.
The post Arizona: progress towards the approval of digital asset reserve laws appeared first on Atlas21.
source: https://atlas21.com/arizona-progress-towards-the-approval-of-digital-asset-reserve-laws/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=arizona-progress-towards-the-approval-of-digital-asset-reserve-laws

data.title: Consensys Wins: SEC to Drop MetaMask Case
data.description:
The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) has agreed in principle to dismiss its enforcement case against MetaMask. Pending final approval, the case will be officially closed. Lubin made it clear that Consensys was ready to fight the case to the bitter end but welcomed the outcome. “No company wants to be the target of […]
The post Consensys Wins: SEC to Drop MetaMask Case appeared...
source: https://www.altcoinbuzz.io/cryptocurrency-news/consensys-wins-sec-to-drop-metamask-case/

data.title: THORChain Developer Resigns Over Reversed North Korea Sanctions Vote
data.description:
A THORChain developer resigns after a vote to block North Korean hacker-linked transactions is reversed, sparking debates over the protocol’s decentralization.

The post THORChain Developer Resigns Over Reversed North Korea Sanctions Vote first appeared on Ecoinimist.

source: https://ecoinimist.com/2025/02/28/thorchain-dev-resigns-reversed-vote/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=thorchain-dev-resigns-reversed-vote

data.title: Metamask releases a new roadmap aimed at enhancing user experience
data.description:
MetaMask wallet service provider has revealed a new roadmap aimed at improving user experience. The self-custodial wallet also plans to incorporate smart contract features as well as native Bitcoin and Solana support.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/metamask-releases-a-new-roadmap/

data.title: Binance will update leverage and margin for multiple U-margin perpetual contracts
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance Futures will update the leverage and margin tiers of TRUMPUSDT, IPUSDT, VIDTUSDT, COMBOUSDT and NULSUSDTU perpetual contracts at 17:30 (Beijing time) on February 28, 2025. Users' existing positions before the update will be affected, and users are advised to make corresponding preparations before the adjustment. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: OKX Web3 Wallet Cryptopedia Issue 30 is underway
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News OKX Web3 Wallet Cryptopedia Issue 30 is in progress. From 18:00 on February 21, 2025 to 18:00 on March 7, 2025 (HKT), users who complete the designated tasks of the event will have the opportunity to share the rewards.
It is reported that the WalletConnect network is supported by the WalletConnect Token (WCT) and is an on-chain user experience (UX) ecosystem. Users download or update the OKX App to version 6.78.0 and above, open and switch to the Web3 wallet; after creating or importing a wallet, click "Discover" at the bottom to enter the discovery page, and then select Cryptopedia to enter the 30th WalletConnect interactive area.

data.title: Mirana Ventures is suspected of buying the bottom of ETH, with an average price of $2,134 and a position of 21,667 ETH
data.description: According to the monitoring of the on-chain data analyst "AI Aunt", Mirana Ventures is suspected of buying the bottom of ETH. Six hours ago, the agency recharged $50 million USDT to Falconx, and four hours ago, it withdrew 21,667 ETH, worth $46.25 million, with a position price of about $2,134. At present, all the funds have been recharged into Bybit.
